description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push and pull request. The workflow has three jobs: tests, isort, and warnings, each running on ubuntu-latest. The tests job uses a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, while the other jobs use Python 3.8. Each job checks out the code, sets up Python, ensures the latest setuptools, installs dependencies, and runs tox. The tests job also generates coverage reports and publishes them to Codecov.
